testcase.name: Three-arg constructor sets color correctly
toString contains the color value
getColor returns the color set at construction
toString is not null or empty
setSemiMinor to zero is accepted by the setter
Three-arg constructor sets semiMajor correctly
Three-arg constructor sets semiMinor correctly
setSemiMajor to zero is accepted by the setter
Circle special case: semiMajor equals semiMinor is stored correctly
getSemiMajor returns the current semiMajor
getSemiMinor returns the current semiMinor
setSemiMinor to a very large value is stored correctly
Two-arg constructor sets semiMajor correctly
Two-arg constructor sets semiMinor correctly
Two-arg constructor defaults color to white
Ellipse is a subclass of Shape
setSemiMajor to a very large value is stored correctly
setSemiMajor and setSemiMinor are independent of each other
setSemiMajor updates the semiMajor
setSemiMinor updates the semiMinor
semiMajor survives multiple consecutive setSemiMajor calls
toString contains the semiMajor value
toString contains the semiMinor value
semiMinor survives multiple consecutive setSemiMinor calls
